---
### 2. Ruff Format Check **Status:** PASSED
``` 100 files already formatted ```
---
### 3. Pytest on TUI Tests **Status:** FAILED - 1 test failure out of 131 tests
**Failed Test:** ``` FAILED tests/tui/app/test_view_switching.py::TestViewSwitching::test_right_arrow_cycles_to_next_view ```
**Error:** ``` AssertionError: assert <ViewMode.RUNS: 4> == <ViewMode.PLANS: 1> ```
**Details:** The test expects that after pressing the right arrow three times, the view mode cycles back to PLANS. However, the actual result is ViewMode.RUNS (value 4), indicating that a RUNS view mode was added to the cycle, changing the expected cycling behavior from PLANS → LEARN → OBJECTIVES → PLANS to PLANS → LEARN → OBJECTIVES → RUNS → PLANS.
**Test Summary:** 1 failed, 130 passed in 46.29s
